summary: Comprehensive authentication testing completed for FinFlow. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All auth flows verified working. JWT authentication with access/refresh tokens fully functional. User data properly scoped. No critical issues found.

issues: Console deprecation warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' and 'shadow* style props are deprecated' - React Native Web compatibility warnings, not critical (same as previous iterations)

action_items: IMPORTANT: Previous test files (test_backend_api.py and test_enhancements.py) do NOT include auth tokens and will now fail since all data endpoints require authentication. These tests should be updated to include Bearer tokens in headers for future regression testing.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ JWT authentication properly implemented with HS256 algorithm
✅ Access tokens expire in 24 hours, refresh tokens in 7 days
✅ Passwords hashed with bcrypt (format starts with $2b$)
✅ Admin seeded on startup with idempotent logic (updates password if changed)
✅ All data endpoints protected with Depends(get_current_user)
✅ User data properly scoped by user_id in all collections (bills, expenses, settings, savings_goals)
✅ Auth tokens checked in both cookies and Authorization header (Bearer)
✅ MongoDB _id excluded from all auth responses
✅ Proper error handling with 401 for unauthorized, 400 for duplicate email
✅ All auth screens have proper testID attributes for testing
✅ Logout functionality properly clears tokens from AsyncStorage
✅ Register endpoint creates default settings for new users
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Used existing admin account (admin@finflow.com / admin123). Created test users during registration tests with unique timestamps.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication system fully implemented and tested. All data endpoints now require JWT Bearer tokens. Admin account: admin@finflow.com / admin123. Landing page shows when not authenticated, dashboard tabs show after login. Logout button in dashboard header (testID='logout-btn'). User data is properly isolated per user_id. Previous test files need auth headers to work.

auth_me.test_auth_me_with_valid_token: PASSED - returns user data without password_hash

auth_protected_endpoints.test_bills_with_auth: PASSED - creates and retrieves user-scoped bills

login_flow.login_screen_loads: PASSED - email and password inputs visible
login_flow.setup_tab_visible: PASSED - Setup tab visible after login

register_flow.register_screen_loads: PASSED - name, email, password inputs visible
register_flow.create_account: PASSED - creates account with unique email
register_flow.redirect_after_register: PASSED - redirects to Setup tab after registration

logout_flow.dashboard_tab_navigation: PASSED - can navigate to Dashboard tab
logout_flow.logout_button_visible: PASSED - testID='logout-btn' visible in dashboard header

navigation.tab_bar_visible: PASSED - Setup, Bills, Expenses, Dashboard tabs visible at bottom

auth_implementation_details.user_scoping: All data endpoints filter by user_id from decoded JWT
auth_implementation_details.admin_seeding: Idempotent - creates or updates admin on startup
